Module Pj2_2025
Package model

Class TransportData

java.lang.Object
model.TransportData
public class TransportData extends Object
A comprehensive data structure that holds all generated transportation information. This includes a representation of the country map (grid of cities), a list of all bus and train stations, and a list of all available departures between stations. This class serves as a central container for the application's core data.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    String[][]
    countryMap
    A 2D array of strings representing the grid-based map of cities in the country.
    List<Departure>
    departures
    A list of Departure objects, each detailing a specific bus or train journey between two stations.
    List<Station>
    stations
    A list of Station objects, where each object represents a transportation hub (containing both bus and train stations) in a specific city.

  • Field Details

    • countryMap

      public String[][] countryMap
      A 2D array of strings representing the grid-based map of cities in the country. Each element typically holds a city identifier like "G_X_Y".

    • stations

      public List<Station> stations
      A list of Station objects, where each object represents a transportation hub (containing both bus and train stations) in a specific city.

    • departures

      public List<Departure> departures
      A list of Departure objects, each detailing a specific bus or train journey between two stations.

  • Constructor Details

    • TransportData

      public TransportData()

  • Method Details

    • getCountryMap

      public String[][] getCountryMap()
      Returns the 2D array representing the country map.
      Returns:
      The country map as a String[][].

    • setCountryMap

      public void setCountryMap(String[][] countryMap)
      Sets the 2D array representing the country map.
      Parameters:
      countryMap - The String[][] to set as the country map.

    • getStations

      public List<Station> getStations()
      Returns the list of all stations.
      Returns:
      A List of Station objects.

    • setStations

      public void setStations(List<Station> stations)
      Sets the list of stations.
      Parameters:
      stations - The List of Station objects to set.

    • getDepartures

      public List<Departure> getDepartures()
      Returns the list of all departures.
      Returns:
      A List of Departure objects.

    • setDepartures

      public void setDepartures(List<Departure> departures)
      Sets the list of departures.
      Parameters:
      departures - The List of Departure objects to set.

    • printTransportData

      public void printTransportData()
      Prints a formatted summary of all transportation data contained within this object to the console. This includes the country map, details of each station, and details of each departure. This method is useful for verifying the loaded or generated data.
